title: Nephrodesmus macrobotryosus
taxonomy: Nephrodesmus macrobotryosus is a plant species classified within the family Mimosaceae. It belongs to the genus Nephrodesmus. This plant is a type of legume, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants in the order Fabales. Nephrodesmus macrobotryosus is native to tropical regions and is often found in humid environments. The classification of Nephrodesmus macrobotryosus is still being studied by botanists for more accurate information.
